title: Managing Component State with the useState Hook

questions.sentence: In React managing a components internal data is a core responsibility
The useState hook is the primary tool for this task in functional components
When you call useState it returns a pair the current state value and a function that lets you update it
The most important feature of state is that when its updated via the setter function React automatically triggers a rerender of the component
This ensures that the user interface always reflects the most recent data
